text.title: stakeholder-engagement-advanced Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stakeholder-engagement-advanced as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating all stakeholders the same — identical email cadence, identical information level.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stakeholders at different levels and with different power need different content, channel, and frequency. One-size comms accelerates disengagement.

failure-mode.description: Assuming that support earned once is permanent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Engagement decays under competing priorities, project delays, or broken commitments. Leading stakeholders who feel ignored revert to Neutral within weeks.
